blurb: Apple Configurator for Mac enables administrators to configure, supervise, and restore iPad, iPhone, and Apple TV devices in bulk over USB without internet access on the target devices. For Mac and Apple Vision Pro restore operations, the required OS update files are downloaded from Apple servers over TLS and installed directly, with the file deleted after use to prevent unauthorized re-use. Devices enrolled via Apple Configurator can be added to Apple School Manager or Apple Business Manager, gaining supervised status and mandatory device management enrollment while still enforcing Activation Lock requirements that apply during normal nontethered activation.
